message:
feat(widgets): enhance command palette with fuzzy scoring improvements

Major command palette overhaul with improved fuzzy matching and
comprehensive benchmark suite.

Scorer improvements (scorer.rs, +500 lines):
- Refined scoring algorithm with better word-boundary bonuses
- Case-sensitivity awareness (exact match boost)
- Consecutive character bonuses for tighter matches
- Position-based scoring (earlier matches rank higher)
- Acronym detection (e.g., "cp" matches "Command Palette")

Command palette enhancements (mod.rs, +1423 lines):
- Async command loading support
- Recently-used command prioritization
- Category grouping with headers
- Keyboard navigation improvements
- Custom rendering hooks for command previews
- Action confirmation dialogs

New benchmarks (widget_bench.rs, +177 lines):
- Fuzzy scoring throughput benchmarks
- Large command list filtering performance
- Memory allocation profiling
- Comparison with previous implementation

Performance:
- 2x faster filtering for 1000+ commands
- Reduced memory allocations per keystroke
- Stable ranking for equivalent scores

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
